function batchAwardPoints(tuple(address nodeAddress, uint256 bandwidthMB, uint256 timestamp)[] _updates) external
function getNodeStats(address _nodeAddress) external view returns (uint256 points, uint256 bandwidthMB, uint256 bandwidthGB)
function getContractStats() external view returns (uint256 totalPoints, uint256 pointsRate, uint256 totalNodes)
event PointsAwarded(address indexed node, uint256 points, uint256 bandwidthMB)
